# build-ci/manifests-exclude

All CI manifests in `build-ci/manifests` are executed by `build-ci`. If there is a CI manifest that needs to be disabled temporarily, move it into `build-ci/manifests-exclude`.

## 14/07/2026 - gcc_access-esm1.6.spack.yaml.j2
